label: About
title: About Navmesh Paste Wall
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 91 recent saved-signal files and 78 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around @KristianMuniz: I spent the past day and a half building a game with with Fable 5 that turns the... and Anchor image material 1, plus 7 more. A source image from sidsaladi.substack.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Navmesh Paste Wall: A dense torn poster wall, composition archetype: torn poster wall, camera grammar: straight-on wall plate with shallow relief. One huge ripped game-map fragment dominates, crossed by scratched navmesh routes and node clusters; diagonal pasted strata, lifted corners, tape scars, stains, and glossy media shards break... After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against central torn route-map field, upper-left teal glassy media pocket, and upper-right red smoked aperture.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
